textAr: قَدْ أَفْلَحَ ٱلْمُؤْمِنُونَ
textEn: The believers have attained true success:
textTranslit: Qad aflahal mu'minoon

textAr: ٱلَّذِينَ هُمْ فِى صَلَاتِهِمْ خَـٰشِعُونَ
textEn: those who humble themselves in their prayers,
textTranslit: Allazeena hum fee Salaatihim khaashi'oon

textAr: وَٱلَّذِينَ هُمْ عَنِ ٱللَّغْوِ مُعْرِضُونَ
textEn: and those who turn away from all that is vain,
textTranslit: Wallazeena hum 'anillaghwimu'ridoon

textAr: وَٱلَّذِينَ هُمْ لِلزَّكَوٰةِ فَـٰعِلُونَ
textEn: and those who give zakah,
textTranslit: Wallazeena hum liz Zakaati faa'iloon

textAr: وَٱلَّذِينَ هُمْ لِفُرُوجِهِمْ حَـٰفِظُونَ
textEn: and those who guard their sexual desires,
textTranslit: Wallazeena hum lifuroo jihim haafizoon

textAr: إِلَّا عَلَىٰٓ أَزْوَٰجِهِمْ أَوْ مَا مَلَكَتْ أَيْمَـٰنُهُمْ فَإِنَّهُمْ غَيْرُ مَلُومِينَ
textEn: except with their wives or slave women they may own, for then they are free of blame.
textTranslit: Illaa 'alaaa azwaajihim aw maa malakat aimaanuhum fa innahum ghairu maloomeen

textAr: فَمَنِ ٱبْتَغَىٰ وَرَآءَ ذَٰلِكَ فَأُو۟لَـٰٓئِكَ هُمُ ٱلْعَادُونَ
textEn: But whoever seeks anything beyond that, it is they who are the transgressors.
textTranslit: Famanib taghaa waraaa'a zaalika fa ulaaa'ika humul 'aadoon

textAr: وَٱلَّذِينَ هُمْ لِأَمَـٰنَـٰتِهِمْ وَعَهْدِهِمْ رَٰعُونَ
textEn: And those who are faithful to their trusts and pledges,
textTranslit: Wallazeena hum li amaanaatihim wa 'ahdihim raa'oon

textAr: وَٱلَّذِينَ هُمْ عَلَىٰ صَلَوَٰتِهِمْ يُحَافِظُونَ
textEn: and those who properly observe their prayers.
textTranslit: Wallazeena hum 'alaa Salawaatihim yuhaafizoon

textAr: أُو۟لَـٰٓئِكَ هُمُ ٱلْوَٰرِثُونَ
textEn: Such will be the inheritors,
textTranslit: Ulaaa'ika humul waarisoon

textAr: ٱلَّذِينَ يَرِثُونَ ٱلْفِرْدَوْسَ هُمْ فِيهَا خَـٰلِدُونَ
textEn: who will inherit Paradise; they will abide therein forever.
textTranslit: Allazeena yarisoonal Firdawsa hum feehaa khaalidoon

textAr: وَلَقَدْ خَلَقْنَا ٱلْإِنسَـٰنَ مِن سُلَـٰلَةٍ مِّن طِينٍ
textEn: We created man from an extract of clay,
textTranslit: Wa laqad khalaqnal insaana min sulaalatim minteen

textAr: ثُمَّ جَعَلْنَـٰهُ نُطْفَةً فِى قَرَارٍ مَّكِينٍ
textEn: then We placed him as a sperm-drop in a safe place,
textTranslit: Summa ja'alnaahu nutfatan fee qaraarim makeen

textAr: ثُمَّ خَلَقْنَا ٱلنُّطْفَةَ عَلَقَةً فَخَلَقْنَا ٱلْعَلَقَةَ مُضْغَةً فَخَلَقْنَا ٱلْمُضْغَةَ عِظَـٰمًا فَكَسَوْنَا ٱلْعِظَـٰمَ لَحْمًا ثُمَّ أَنشَأْنَـٰهُ خَلْقًا ءَاخَرَ ۚ فَتَبَارَكَ ٱللَّهُ أَحْسَنُ ٱلْخَـٰلِقِينَ
textEn: then We made the sperm drop into a clinging clot, then We made the clinging clot into a lump, then We made the lump into bones, and We clothed the bones with flesh, and then We developed it into another creation. So Blessed is Allah, the Best of Creators.
textTranslit: Summa khalaqnan nutfata 'alaqatan fakhalaqnal 'alaqata mudghatan fakhalaq nal mudghata 'izaaman fakasawnal 'izaama lahman summa anshaanaahu khalqan aakhar; fatabaarakal laahu ahsanul khaaliqeen

textAr: ثُمَّ إِنَّكُم بَعْدَ ذَٰلِكَ لَمَيِّتُونَ
textEn: Then after that you will surely die,
textTranslit: Summa innakum ba'da zaalika la maaiyitoon

textAr: ثُمَّ إِنَّكُمْ يَوْمَ ٱلْقِيَـٰمَةِ تُبْعَثُونَ
textEn: then on the Day of Resurrection, you will surely be resurrected.
textTranslit: Summa innakum Yawmal Qiyaamati tub'asoon

textAr: وَلَقَدْ خَلَقْنَا فَوْقَكُمْ سَبْعَ طَرَآئِقَ وَمَا كُنَّا عَنِ ٱلْخَلْقِ غَـٰفِلِينَ
textEn: We have created above you seven levels [of heaven], and We have never been unaware of Our creation.
textTranslit: Wa laqad khalaqnaa fawqakum sab'a taraaa'iqa wa maa kunnaa 'anil khalqi ghaafileen

textAr: وَأَنزَلْنَا مِنَ ٱلسَّمَآءِ مَآءًۢ بِقَدَرٍ فَأَسْكَنَّـٰهُ فِى ٱلْأَرْضِ ۖ وَإِنَّا عَلَىٰ ذَهَابٍۭ بِهِۦ لَقَـٰدِرُونَ
textEn: We send down water from the sky in due measure and cause it to stay in the earth, and We are surely able to take it away.
textTranslit: Wa anzalnaa minas samaaa'i maaa'am biqadarin fa-askannaahu fil ardi wa innaa 'alaa zahaabim bihee laqaa diroon

textAr: فَأَنشَأْنَا لَكُم بِهِۦ جَنَّـٰتٍ مِّن نَّخِيلٍ وَأَعْنَـٰبٍ لَّكُمْ فِيهَا فَوَٰكِهُ كَثِيرَةٌ وَمِنْهَا تَأْكُلُونَ
textEn: With this [water] We produce for you gardens of palm trees and grapevines, in which there are many fruits from which you eat,
textTranslit: Fa anshaanaa lakum bihee Jannaatim min nakheelinw wa a'naab; lakum feehaa fawaakihu kaseeratunw wa minhaa taakuloon

textAr: وَشَجَرَةً تَخْرُجُ مِن طُورِ سَيْنَآءَ تَنۢبُتُ بِٱلدُّهْنِ وَصِبْغٍ لِّلْـَٔاكِلِينَ
textEn: and [olive] tree that grows at Mount Sinai, producing oil and condiments for those who eat.
textTranslit: Wa shajaratan takhruju min Toori Sainaaa'a tambutu bidduhni wa sibghil lil aakileen

textAr: وَإِنَّ لَكُمْ فِى ٱلْأَنْعَـٰمِ لَعِبْرَةً ۖ نُّسْقِيكُم مِّمَّا فِى بُطُونِهَا وَلَكُمْ فِيهَا مَنَـٰفِعُ كَثِيرَةٌ وَمِنْهَا تَأْكُلُونَ
textEn: And there is certainly a lesson for you in livestock animals. We provide you with a drink out of what they have in their bellies, and for you there are many benefits in them, and from their [meat] you eat,
textTranslit: Wa inna lakum fil an'aami la'ibrah; nusqeekum mimmaa fee butoonihaa wa lakum feehaa manaafi'u kaseeratunw wa minhaa taakuloon

textAr: وَعَلَيْهَا وَعَلَى ٱلْفُلْكِ تُحْمَلُونَ
textEn: and on them and on boats you are carried.
textTranslit: Wa 'alaihaa wa'alal fulki tuhmaloon

textAr: وَلَقَدْ أَرْسَلْنَا نُوحًا إِلَىٰ قَوْمِهِۦ فَقَالَ يَـٰقَوْمِ ٱعْبُدُوا۟ ٱللَّهَ مَا لَكُم مِّنْ إِلَـٰهٍ غَيْرُهُۥٓ ۖ أَفَلَا تَتَّقُونَ
textEn: We sent Noah to his people. He said, “O my people, worship Allah; you have no god other than Him. Will you not then fear Him?”
textTranslit: Wa laqad arsalnaa Noohan ilaa qawmihee faqaala yaa qawmi'budul laaha maa lakum min ilahin ghairuhoo afalaa tattaqoon

textAr: فَقَالَ ٱلْمَلَؤُا۟ ٱلَّذِينَ كَفَرُوا۟ مِن قَوْمِهِۦ مَا هَـٰذَآ إِلَّا بَشَرٌ مِّثْلُكُمْ يُرِيدُ أَن يَتَفَضَّلَ عَلَيْكُمْ وَلَوْ شَآءَ ٱللَّهُ لَأَنزَلَ مَلَـٰٓئِكَةً مَّا سَمِعْنَا بِهَـٰذَا فِىٓ ءَابَآئِنَا ٱلْأَوَّلِينَ
textEn: The disbelieving chiefs of his people said, “This is only a man like yourselves who wants to be superior to you. If Allah had willed, He could have sent down angels. We have not heard such a thing from our forefathers.
textTranslit: Faqaalal mala'ul lazeena kafaroo min qawmihee maa haazaaa illaa basharum mislukum yureedu ai yatafaddala 'alaikum wa law shaaa'al laahu la anzala malaaa'ikatam maa sami'naa bihaazaa feee aabaaa'inal awwaleen

textAr: إِنْ هُوَ إِلَّا رَجُلٌۢ بِهِۦ جِنَّةٌ فَتَرَبَّصُوا۟ بِهِۦ حَتَّىٰ حِينٍ
textEn: He is just a madman, so bear with him for a while.”
textTranslit: In huwa illaa rajulum bihee jinnatun fatarabbasoo bihee hattan heen

textAr: قَالَ رَبِّ ٱنصُرْنِى بِمَا كَذَّبُونِ
textEn: Noah said, “My Lord, help me, for they have rejected me.”
textTranslit: Qaala Rabbin surnee bimaa kazzaboon

textAr: فَأَوْحَيْنَآ إِلَيْهِ أَنِ ٱصْنَعِ ٱلْفُلْكَ بِأَعْيُنِنَا وَوَحْيِنَا فَإِذَا جَآءَ أَمْرُنَا وَفَارَ ٱلتَّنُّورُ ۙ فَٱسْلُكْ فِيهَا مِن كُلٍّ زَوْجَيْنِ ٱثْنَيْنِ وَأَهْلَكَ إِلَّا مَن سَبَقَ عَلَيْهِ ٱلْقَوْلُ مِنْهُمْ ۖ وَلَا تُخَـٰطِبْنِى فِى ٱلَّذِينَ ظَلَمُوٓا۟ ۖ إِنَّهُم مُّغْرَقُونَ
textEn: So We inspired him [saying], “Make the Ark under Our Eyes and according to Our directions. Then when Our command comes and the oven bursts with water, take on board a pair of each species and your family, except those against whom the decree has already been passed. And do not plead with Me concerning those who have done wrong, for they will surely be drowned.”
textTranslit: Fa awhainaaa ilaihi anis na'il fulka bi a'yuninaa wa wahyinaa fa izaa jaaa'a amrunaa wa faarat tannooru fasluk feehaa min kullin zawjainis naini wa ahlaka illaa man sabaqa 'alaihil qawlu minhum wa laa tukhaat ibnee fil lazeena zalamooo innaahum mughraqoon

textAr: فَإِذَا ٱسْتَوَيْتَ أَنتَ وَمَن مَّعَكَ عَلَى ٱلْفُلْكِ فَقُلِ ٱلْحَمْدُ لِلَّهِ ٱلَّذِى نَجَّىٰنَا مِنَ ٱلْقَوْمِ ٱلظَّـٰلِمِينَ
textEn: Then when you and those who are with you have embarked on the Ark, say, “All praise is for Allah, Who saved us from the wrongdoing people.”
textTranslit: Fa izas tawaita ata wa mam ma'aka 'alal fulki faqulil hamdu lillaahil lazee najjaanaa minal qawmiz zalimeen

textAr: وَقُل رَّبِّ أَنزِلْنِى مُنزَلًا مُّبَارَكًا وَأَنتَ خَيْرُ ٱلْمُنزِلِينَ
textEn: And say: “My Lord, make my landing a blessed landing, for You provide the best landing’”.
textTranslit: Wa qur Rabbi anzilnee munzalam mubaarakanw wa Anta khairul munzileen

textAr: إِنَّ فِى ذَٰلِكَ لَـَٔايَـٰتٍ وَإِن كُنَّا لَمُبْتَلِينَ
textEn: Indeed, there are signs in this, and We always put people to the test.
textTranslit: Inna fee zaalika la Aayaatinw wa in kunnaa lamubtaleen

textAr: ثُمَّ أَنشَأْنَا مِنۢ بَعْدِهِمْ قَرْنًا ءَاخَرِينَ
textEn: Then We raised up after them another generation,
textTranslit: Summaa anshaana mim ba'dihim qarnan aakhareen

textAr: فَأَرْسَلْنَا فِيهِمْ رَسُولًا مِّنْهُمْ أَنِ ٱعْبُدُوا۟ ٱللَّهَ مَا لَكُم مِّنْ إِلَـٰهٍ غَيْرُهُۥٓ ۖ أَفَلَا تَتَّقُونَ
textEn: and We sent to them a messenger from among themselves [saying], “Worship Allah; you have no god other than Him. Will you not then fear Him?”
textTranslit: Fa arsalnaa feehim Rasoolam minhum ani'budul laaha maa lakum min ilaahin ghairuhoo afalaa tattaqoon

textAr: وَقَالَ ٱلْمَلَأُ مِن قَوْمِهِ ٱلَّذِينَ كَفَرُوا۟ وَكَذَّبُوا۟ بِلِقَآءِ ٱلْـَٔاخِرَةِ وَأَتْرَفْنَـٰهُمْ فِى ٱلْحَيَوٰةِ ٱلدُّنْيَا مَا هَـٰذَآ إِلَّا بَشَرٌ مِّثْلُكُمْ يَأْكُلُ مِمَّا تَأْكُلُونَ مِنْهُ وَيَشْرَبُ مِمَّا تَشْرَبُونَ
textEn: But the chiefs of his people who disbelieved and denied the meeting of the Hereafter, and whom We had made affluent in the life of this world, said, “He is no more than a man like yourselves; he eats what you eat and drinks what you drink.
textTranslit: Wa qaalal mala-u min qawmihil lazeena kafaroo wa kazzaboo bi liqaaa'il Aakhirati wa atrafnaahum fil hayaatid dunyaa maa haazaaa illaa basharum mislukum yaakulu mimmaa taakuloona minhu wa yashrabu mimmaa tashraboon

textAr: وَلَئِنْ أَطَعْتُم بَشَرًا مِّثْلَكُمْ إِنَّكُمْ إِذًا لَّخَـٰسِرُونَ
textEn: If you obey a man like yourselves, you will surely be losers.
textTranslit: Wa la'in at'atum basharam mislakum innakum izal lakhaasiroon

textAr: أَيَعِدُكُمْ أَنَّكُمْ إِذَا مِتُّمْ وَكُنتُمْ تُرَابًا وَعِظَـٰمًا أَنَّكُم مُّخْرَجُونَ
textEn: Does he promise you that when you have died and become dust and bones, you will be brought forth?
textTranslit: A-Ya'idukum annakum izaa mittum wa kuntum turaabanw wa izaaman annakum mukhrajoon

textAr: ۞ هَيْهَاتَ هَيْهَاتَ لِمَا تُوعَدُونَ
textEn: Far-fetched, utterly far-fetched is what you are promised!
textTranslit: Haihaata haihaata limaa too'adoon

textAr: إِنْ هِىَ إِلَّا حَيَاتُنَا ٱلدُّنْيَا نَمُوتُ وَنَحْيَا وَمَا نَحْنُ بِمَبْعُوثِينَ
textEn: There is nothing except our life in this world; we die, others are born, and none will be resurrected.
textTranslit: In hiya illaa hayaatunad dunyaa namootu wa nahyaa wa maa nahnu bimab'ooseen

textAr: إِنْ هُوَ إِلَّا رَجُلٌ ٱفْتَرَىٰ عَلَى ٱللَّهِ كَذِبًا وَمَا نَحْنُ لَهُۥ بِمُؤْمِنِينَ
textEn: He is no more than a man who has fabricated lies about Allah, and we will never believe in him.”
textTranslit: In huwa illaa rajulunif taraa 'alal laahi kazibanw wa maa nahnuu lahoo bimu'mineen

textAr: قَالَ رَبِّ ٱنصُرْنِى بِمَا كَذَّبُونِ
textEn: Noah said, “My Lord, help me for they have rejected me.”
textTranslit: Qaala Rabbin surnee bimaa kazzaboon

textAr: قَالَ عَمَّا قَلِيلٍ لَّيُصْبِحُنَّ نَـٰدِمِينَ
textEn: Allah said, “In a little while they will surely be regretful.”
textTranslit: Qaala 'ammaa qaleelil la yusbihunna naadimeen

textAr: فَأَخَذَتْهُمُ ٱلصَّيْحَةُ بِٱلْحَقِّ فَجَعَلْنَـٰهُمْ غُثَآءً ۚ فَبُعْدًا لِّلْقَوْمِ ٱلظَّـٰلِمِينَ
textEn: So the huge blast overtook them in all justice, and We swept them away like scum. So away with the wrongdoing people!
textTranslit: Fa akhazat humus saihatu bilhaqqi faja'alnaahum ghusaaa'aa; fabu;dal lilqaw miz zaalimeen

textAr: ثُمَّ أَنشَأْنَا مِنۢ بَعْدِهِمْ قُرُونًا ءَاخَرِينَ
textEn: Then We raised after them other generations.
textTranslit: Summa anshaanaa mim ba'dihim quroonan aakhareen

textAr: مَا تَسْبِقُ مِنْ أُمَّةٍ أَجَلَهَا وَمَا يَسْتَـْٔخِرُونَ
textEn: No nation can bring its appointed time forward, nor can it delay it.
textTranslit: Maa tasbiqu min ummatin ajalahaa wa maa yastaakhiroon

textAr: ثُمَّ أَرْسَلْنَا رُسُلَنَا تَتْرَا ۖ كُلَّ مَا جَآءَ أُمَّةً رَّسُولُهَا كَذَّبُوهُ ۚ فَأَتْبَعْنَا بَعْضَهُم بَعْضًا وَجَعَلْنَـٰهُمْ أَحَادِيثَ ۚ فَبُعْدًا لِّقَوْمٍ لَّا يُؤْمِنُونَ
textEn: Then We sent Our messengers in succession: every time a messenger came to his people, they rejected him. So We destroyed them, one after the others, and made them mere tales. Away with the people who refuse to believe!
textTranslit: Summa arsalnaa Rusulanaa tatraa kulla maa jaaa'a ummatar Rasooluhaa kazzabooh; fa atba'naa ba'dahum ba'danw wa ja'alnaahum ahaadees; fabu'dal liqawmil laa yu'minoon

textAr: ثُمَّ أَرْسَلْنَا مُوسَىٰ وَأَخَاهُ هَـٰرُونَ بِـَٔايَـٰتِنَا وَسُلْطَـٰنٍ مُّبِينٍ
textEn: Then We sent Moses and his brother Aaron with Our signs and compelling proof
textTranslit: Summa arsalnaa Moosaa wa akhaahu Haaroona bi Aayaatinaa wa sultaanim mubeen

textAr: إِلَىٰ فِرْعَوْنَ وَمَلَإِي۟هِۦ فَٱسْتَكْبَرُوا۟ وَكَانُوا۟ قَوْمًا عَالِينَ
textEn: to Pharaoh and his chiefs, but they showed arrogance and were haughty people.
textTranslit: Ilaa Fir'awna wa mala'ihee fastakbaroo wa kaanoo qawman 'aaleem

textAr: فَقَالُوٓا۟ أَنُؤْمِنُ لِبَشَرَيْنِ مِثْلِنَا وَقَوْمُهُمَا لَنَا عَـٰبِدُونَ
textEn: They said, “Should we believe in two men like ourselves when their people are our slaves?”
textTranslit: Faqaaloo annu'minu libasharaini mislinaa wa qawmuhumaa lanaa 'aabidoon

textAr: فَكَذَّبُوهُمَا فَكَانُوا۟ مِنَ ٱلْمُهْلَكِينَ
textEn: So they rejected them both and were among those who were destroyed.
textTranslit: Fakazzaboohumaa fakaanoo minal mmuhlakeen

textAr: وَلَقَدْ ءَاتَيْنَا مُوسَى ٱلْكِتَـٰبَ لَعَلَّهُمْ يَهْتَدُونَ
textEn: We gave Moses the Scripture so that they might be guided.
textTranslit: Wa laqad aatainaa Moosal Kitaaba la'allahum yahtadoon

textAr: وَجَعَلْنَا ٱبْنَ مَرْيَمَ وَأُمَّهُۥٓ ءَايَةً وَءَاوَيْنَـٰهُمَآ إِلَىٰ رَبْوَةٍ ذَاتِ قَرَارٍ وَمَعِينٍ
textEn: We made the son of Mary and his mother a sign and sheltered them on a hillside – a place of rest and a flowing stream.
textTranslit: Wa ja'alnab na Maryama wa ummahooo aayatannw wa aawainaahumaaa ilaa rabwatin zaati qaraarinw wa ma'een

textAr: يَـٰٓأَيُّهَا ٱلرُّسُلُ كُلُوا۟ مِنَ ٱلطَّيِّبَـٰتِ وَٱعْمَلُوا۟ صَـٰلِحًا ۖ إِنِّى بِمَا تَعْمَلُونَ عَلِيمٌ
textEn: O messengers, eat from the lawful things and act righteously, for I am All-Knowing of what you do.
textTranslit: Yaaa aiyuhar Rusulu kuloo minat taiyibaati wa'maloo saalihan innee bimaa ta'maloona 'Aleem

textAr: وَإِنَّ هَـٰذِهِۦٓ أُمَّتُكُمْ أُمَّةً وَٰحِدَةً وَأَنَا۠ رَبُّكُمْ فَٱتَّقُونِ
textEn: Indeed, this religion of yours is one religion, and I am your Lord, so fear Me.
textTranslit: Wa inna haaziheee ummatukum ummatanw waahidatanw wa Ana Rabbukum fattaqoon

textAr: فَتَقَطَّعُوٓا۟ أَمْرَهُم بَيْنَهُمْ زُبُرًا ۖ كُلُّ حِزْبٍۭ بِمَا لَدَيْهِمْ فَرِحُونَ
textEn: But people split up their religion into factions, each faction rejoicing in what it has.
textTranslit: Fataqatta'ooo amrahum bainahum zuburaa; kullu hizbim bimaa ladaihim farihoon

textAr: فَذَرْهُمْ فِى غَمْرَتِهِمْ حَتَّىٰ حِينٍ
textEn: So leave them in their heedlessness for a while.
textTranslit: Fazarhum fee ghamratihim hattaa heen

textAr: أَيَحْسَبُونَ أَنَّمَا نُمِدُّهُم بِهِۦ مِن مَّالٍ وَبَنِينَ
textEn: Do they think that what We give them wealth and children,
textTranslit: A-yahsaboona annnamaa numiduhum bihee mimmaalinw wa baneen

textAr: نُسَارِعُ لَهُمْ فِى ٱلْخَيْرَٰتِ ۚ بَل لَّا يَشْعُرُونَ
textEn: that We hasten to them all that is good? No, but they do not perceive it.
textTranslit: Nusaari'u lahum fil khairaat; bal laa yash'uroon

textAr: إِنَّ ٱلَّذِينَ هُم مِّنْ خَشْيَةِ رَبِّهِم مُّشْفِقُونَ
textEn: Those who are in awe for fear of their Lord,
textTranslit: Innal lazeena hum min khashyati Rabbihim mushfiqoon

textAr: وَٱلَّذِينَ هُم بِـَٔايَـٰتِ رَبِّهِمْ يُؤْمِنُونَ
textEn: and those who believe in the verses of their Lord,
textTranslit: Wallazeena hum bi Aayaati Rabbihim yu'minoon

textAr: وَٱلَّذِينَ هُم بِرَبِّهِمْ لَا يُشْرِكُونَ
textEn: and those who do not associate partners with their Lord,
textTranslit: Wallazeena hum bi Rabbihim laa yushrikoon

textAr: وَٱلَّذِينَ يُؤْتُونَ مَآ ءَاتَوا۟ وَّقُلُوبُهُمْ وَجِلَةٌ أَنَّهُمْ إِلَىٰ رَبِّهِمْ رَٰجِعُونَ
textEn: and those who do whatever [good] they do with their hearts fearful, knowing that they will return to their Lord –
textTranslit: Wallazeena yu'toona maaa aataw wa quloobuhum wajilatun annahum ilaa Rabbihim raaji'oon

textAr: أُو۟لَـٰٓئِكَ يُسَـٰرِعُونَ فِى ٱلْخَيْرَٰتِ وَهُمْ لَهَا سَـٰبِقُونَ
textEn: it is they who hasten to do good deeds, and they are foremost in them.
textTranslit: Ulaaa'ika yusaari'oona fil khairaati wa hum lahaa saabiqoon

textAr: وَلَا نُكَلِّفُ نَفْسًا إِلَّا وُسْعَهَا ۖ وَلَدَيْنَا كِتَـٰبٌ يَنطِقُ بِٱلْحَقِّ ۚ وَهُمْ لَا يُظْلَمُونَ
textEn: We do not burden a soul more than what it can bear. We have a Record [of their deeds] that tells the truth, and none will be wronged.
textTranslit: Wa laa nukallifu nafsan illaa wus'ahaa wa ladainaa kitaabuny yantiqu bilhaqqi w ahum la yuzlamoon

textAr: بَلْ قُلُوبُهُمْ فِى غَمْرَةٍ مِّنْ هَـٰذَا وَلَهُمْ أَعْمَـٰلٌ مِّن دُونِ ذَٰلِكَ هُمْ لَهَا عَـٰمِلُونَ
textEn: But their hearts are oblivious to this, and they have other [evil] deeds that they are doing.
textTranslit: Bal quloobuhum fee ghamratim min haazaa wa lahum a'maalum min dooni zaalika hum lahaa 'aamiloon

textAr: حَتَّىٰٓ إِذَآ أَخَذْنَا مُتْرَفِيهِم بِٱلْعَذَابِ إِذَا هُمْ يَجْـَٔرُونَ
textEn: But as soon as We seize their affluent ones with punishment, they start crying for help.
textTranslit: Hattaaa izaaa akhznaa mutrafeehim bil'azaabi izaa hum yaj'aroon

textAr: لَا تَجْـَٔرُوا۟ ٱلْيَوْمَ ۖ إِنَّكُم مِّنَّا لَا تُنصَرُونَ
textEn: “Do not cry for help today, for you will receive no help from Us.
textTranslit: Laa taj'arul yawma innakum minnaa laa tunsaroon

textAr: قَدْ كَانَتْ ءَايَـٰتِى تُتْلَىٰ عَلَيْكُمْ فَكُنتُمْ عَلَىٰٓ أَعْقَـٰبِكُمْ تَنكِصُونَ
textEn: My verses were recited to you, but you used to turn back on your heels,
textTranslit: Qad kaanat Aayaatee tutlaa 'alaikum fakuntum 'alaaa a'qaabikum tankisoon

textAr: مُسْتَكْبِرِينَ بِهِۦ سَـٰمِرًا تَهْجُرُونَ
textEn: feeling proud of this [Sacred House], spending night in evil talks [about the Qur’an].”
textTranslit: Mustakbireena bihee saamiran tahjuroon

textAr: أَفَلَمْ يَدَّبَّرُوا۟ ٱلْقَوْلَ أَمْ جَآءَهُم مَّا لَمْ يَأْتِ ءَابَآءَهُمُ ٱلْأَوَّلِينَ
textEn: Have they not pondered the Words [of Allah], or has there come to them what did not come to their forefathers?
textTranslit: Afalam yaddabbarrul qawla am jaaa'ahum maa lam yaati aabaaa'ahumul awwaleen

textAr: أَمْ لَمْ يَعْرِفُوا۟ رَسُولَهُمْ فَهُمْ لَهُۥ مُنكِرُونَ
textEn: Or is it that they do not recognize their Messenger, so they deny him?
textTranslit: Am lam ya'rifoo Rasoolahum fahum lahoo munkiroon

textAr: أَمْ يَقُولُونَ بِهِۦ جِنَّةٌۢ ۚ بَلْ جَآءَهُم بِٱلْحَقِّ وَأَكْثَرُهُمْ لِلْحَقِّ كَـٰرِهُونَ
textEn: Or do they say, “There is madness in him?” Rather, he has come to them with the truth, but most of them are averse to the truth.
textTranslit: Am yaqooloona bihee jinnnah; bal jaaa'ahum bilhaqqi wa aksaruhum lil haqqi kaarihoon

textAr: وَلَوِ ٱتَّبَعَ ٱلْحَقُّ أَهْوَآءَهُمْ لَفَسَدَتِ ٱلسَّمَـٰوَٰتُ وَٱلْأَرْضُ وَمَن فِيهِنَّ ۚ بَلْ أَتَيْنَـٰهُم بِذِكْرِهِمْ فَهُمْ عَن ذِكْرِهِم مُّعْرِضُونَ
textEn: Were the Truth to follow their desires, the heavens and earth, and all those who are therein would have been ruined. In fact, We have given them their Reminder, but they are averse to their Reminder.
textTranslit: Wa lawit taba'al haqqu ahwaaa'ahum lafasadatis samaawaatu wal ardu wa man feehinnn; bal atainaahum bizikrihim fahum 'an zikrihim mu'ridon

textAr: أَمْ تَسْـَٔلُهُمْ خَرْجًا فَخَرَاجُ رَبِّكَ خَيْرٌ ۖ وَهُوَ خَيْرُ ٱلرَّٰزِقِينَ
textEn: Or do you ask them for some reward? But the reward of your Lord is best, and He is the Best of Providers.
textTranslit: Am tas'aluhum kharjan fakharaaju Rabbika khairunw wa Huwa khairur raaziqeen

textAr: وَإِنَّكَ لَتَدْعُوهُمْ إِلَىٰ صِرَٰطٍ مُّسْتَقِيمٍ
textEn: Indeed, you are calling them to a straight path,
textTranslit: Wa innaka latad'oohum ilaa Siraatim Mustaqeem

textAr: وَإِنَّ ٱلَّذِينَ لَا يُؤْمِنُونَ بِٱلْـَٔاخِرَةِ عَنِ ٱلصِّرَٰطِ لَنَـٰكِبُونَ
textEn: but those who do not believe in the Hereafter are deviating from that path.
textTranslit: Wa innnal lazeena laa yu'minoona bil Aakhirati 'anis siraati lanaakiboon

textAr: ۞ وَلَوْ رَحِمْنَـٰهُمْ وَكَشَفْنَا مَا بِهِم مِّن ضُرٍّ لَّلَجُّوا۟ فِى طُغْيَـٰنِهِمْ يَعْمَهُونَ
textEn: Even if We were to show them mercy and relieve their adversity, they would still persist in their transgression, wandering blindly.
textTranslit: Wa law rahimnaahum wa kashafnaa maa bihim min durril lalajjoo fee tughyaanihim ya'mahoon

textAr: وَلَقَدْ أَخَذْنَـٰهُم بِٱلْعَذَابِ فَمَا ٱسْتَكَانُوا۟ لِرَبِّهِمْ وَمَا يَتَضَرَّعُونَ
textEn: We have already seized them with punishment, but they did not humble themselves to their Lord, nor did they supplicate in humility,
textTranslit: Wa laqad akhaznaahum bil'azaabi famastakaanoo li Rabbihim wa maa yatadarra'oon

textAr: حَتَّىٰٓ إِذَا فَتَحْنَا عَلَيْهِم بَابًا ذَا عَذَابٍ شَدِيدٍ إِذَا هُمْ فِيهِ مُبْلِسُونَ
textEn: until when We open for them a gateway of severe punishment, they will be plunged into utter despair.
textTranslit: Hattaaa izaa fatahnaa 'alaihim baaban zaa 'azaabin shadeedin izaa hum feehi mublisoon

textAr: وَهُوَ ٱلَّذِىٓ أَنشَأَ لَكُمُ ٱلسَّمْعَ وَٱلْأَبْصَـٰرَ وَٱلْأَفْـِٔدَةَ ۚ قَلِيلًا مَّا تَشْكُرُونَ
textEn: It is He Who gave you hearing, sight and hearts. How little you give thanks!
textTranslit: Wa Huwal lazeee ansha a-lakumus sam'a wal absaara wal af'idah; qaleelam maa tashkuroon

textAr: وَهُوَ ٱلَّذِى ذَرَأَكُمْ فِى ٱلْأَرْضِ وَإِلَيْهِ تُحْشَرُونَ
textEn: And it is He Who spread you on earth, and to Him you will all be gathered.
textTranslit: Wa Huwal lazee zara akum fil ardi wa ilaihi tuhsharoon

textAr: وَهُوَ ٱلَّذِى يُحْىِۦ وَيُمِيتُ وَلَهُ ٱخْتِلَـٰفُ ٱلَّيْلِ وَٱلنَّهَارِ ۚ أَفَلَا تَعْقِلُونَ
textEn: It is He Who gives life and causes death, and to Him belongs the alternation of night and day. Do you not understand?
textTranslit: Wa Huwal lazee yuhyee wa yumeetu wa lahukh tilaaful laili wannahaar; afalaa ta'qiloon

textAr: بَلْ قَالُوا۟ مِثْلَ مَا قَالَ ٱلْأَوَّلُونَ
textEn: But they say the like of what the earlier peoples said.
textTranslit: Bal qaaloo misla maa qaalal awwaloon

textAr: قَالُوٓا۟ أَءِذَا مِتْنَا وَكُنَّا تُرَابًا وَعِظَـٰمًا أَءِنَّا لَمَبْعُوثُونَ
textEn: They say, “Is it that when we die and become dust and bones, will we really be resurrected?
textTranslit: Qaalooo 'a-izaa mitnaa wa kunnaa turaabanw wa 'izaaman 'a-innaa lamab 'oosoon

textAr: لَقَدْ وُعِدْنَا نَحْنُ وَءَابَآؤُنَا هَـٰذَا مِن قَبْلُ إِنْ هَـٰذَآ إِلَّآ أَسَـٰطِيرُ ٱلْأَوَّلِينَ
textEn: This is what we and our forefathers were promised before; this is nothing but ancient fables.”
textTranslit: Laqad wu'idnaa nahnu wa aabaaa'unaa haazaa min qablu in haazaaa illaaa asaateerul awwaleen

textAr: قُل لِّمَنِ ٱلْأَرْضُ وَمَن فِيهَآ إِن كُنتُمْ تَعْلَمُونَ
textEn: Say, “To whom belong the earth and all those who are on it, if you really know?”
textTranslit: Qul limanil ardu wa man feehaaa in kuntum ta'lamoon

textAr: سَيَقُولُونَ لِلَّهِ ۚ قُلْ أَفَلَا تَذَكَّرُونَ
textEn: They will say, “To Allah.” Say, “Will you not then take heed?”
textTranslit: Sa-yaqooloona lillaah; qul afalaa tazakkkaroon

textAr: قُلْ مَن رَّبُّ ٱلسَّمَـٰوَٰتِ ٱلسَّبْعِ وَرَبُّ ٱلْعَرْشِ ٱلْعَظِيمِ
textEn: Say, “Who is the Lord of the seven heavens and the Lord of the Mighty Throne?”
textTranslit: Qul mar Rabbus samaawaatis sab'i wa Rabbul 'Arshil 'Azeem

textAr: سَيَقُولُونَ لِلَّهِ ۚ قُلْ أَفَلَا تَتَّقُونَ
textEn: They will say, “Allah.” Say, “Will you not then fear Him?”
textTranslit: Sa yaqooloona lillaah; qul afalaa tattaqoon

textAr: قُلْ مَنۢ بِيَدِهِۦ مَلَكُوتُ كُلِّ شَىْءٍ وَهُوَ يُجِيرُ وَلَا يُجَارُ عَلَيْهِ إِن كُنتُمْ تَعْلَمُونَ
textEn: Say, “In Whose Hand is the dominion of all things – and He gives protection while none can protect against Him – if you really know?”
textTranslit: Qul mam bi yadihee malakootu kulli shai'inw wa Huwa yujeeru wa laa yujaaru 'alaihi in kuntum ta'lamoon

textAr: سَيَقُولُونَ لِلَّهِ ۚ قُلْ فَأَنَّىٰ تُسْحَرُونَ
textEn: They will say, “Allah.” Say, “Then how can you be deluded?”
textTranslit: Sa yaqooloona lillaah; qul fa annaa tus haroon

textAr: بَلْ أَتَيْنَـٰهُم بِٱلْحَقِّ وَإِنَّهُمْ لَكَـٰذِبُونَ
textEn: In fact, We brought them the truth, but they are certainly liars.
textTranslit: Bal atainaahum bil haqqi wa innahum lakaaziboon

textAr: مَا ٱتَّخَذَ ٱللَّهُ مِن وَلَدٍ وَمَا كَانَ مَعَهُۥ مِنْ إِلَـٰهٍ ۚ إِذًا لَّذَهَبَ كُلُّ إِلَـٰهٍۭ بِمَا خَلَقَ وَلَعَلَا بَعْضُهُمْ عَلَىٰ بَعْضٍ ۚ سُبْحَـٰنَ ٱللَّهِ عَمَّا يَصِفُونَ
textEn: Allah has never begotten a son, nor is there any god besides Him. Otherwise, each god would have taken away what he had created, and each would have tried to gain supremacy over the other. Glory be to Allah far above what they ascribe to Him!
textTranslit: Mat takhazal laahu minw waladinw wa maa kaana ma'ahoo min ilaah; izal lazahaba kullu ilaahim bimaa khalaqa wa la'alaa ba'duhum 'alaa ba'd; Subhaannal laahi 'ammaa yasifoon

textAr: عَـٰلِمِ ٱلْغَيْبِ وَٱلشَّهَـٰدَةِ فَتَعَـٰلَىٰ عَمَّا يُشْرِكُونَ
textEn: Knower of the unseen and the seen. Exalted is He far above what they associate with Him!
textTranslit: 'Aalimil Ghaibi wash shahhaadati fata'aalaa 'ammaa yushrikoon

textAr: قُل رَّبِّ إِمَّا تُرِيَنِّى مَا يُوعَدُونَ
textEn: Say, “My Lord, if You show me what they are warned of,
textTranslit: Qur Rabbi immmaa turiyannee maa yoo'adoon

textAr: رَبِّ فَلَا تَجْعَلْنِى فِى ٱلْقَوْمِ ٱلظَّـٰلِمِينَ
textEn: my Lord, then do not include me among the wrongdoing people.”
textTranslit: Rabbi falaa taj'alnee fil qawmiz zaalimeen

textAr: وَإِنَّا عَلَىٰٓ أَن نُّرِيَكَ مَا نَعِدُهُمْ لَقَـٰدِرُونَ
textEn: We are surely able to show you that of which We have warned them.
textTranslit: Wa innaa 'alaaa an nuriyaka maa na'iduhum laqaadiroon

textAr: ٱدْفَعْ بِٱلَّتِى هِىَ أَحْسَنُ ٱلسَّيِّئَةَ ۚ نَحْنُ أَعْلَمُ بِمَا يَصِفُونَ
textEn: Repel evil with what is best; We know well what they claim.
textTranslit: Idfa' billate hiya ahsanus saiyi'ah; nahnu a'lamu bimaa yasifoon

textAr: وَقُل رَّبِّ أَعُوذُ بِكَ مِنْ هَمَزَٰتِ ٱلشَّيَـٰطِينِ
textEn: And say, “My Lord, I seek refuge with You from the temptations of the devils.
textTranslit: Wa qur Rabbi a'oozu bika min hamazaatish Shayaateen

textAr: وَأَعُوذُ بِكَ رَبِّ أَن يَحْضُرُونِ
textEn: And I seek refuge with You, my Lord, that they even come near me.”
textTranslit: Wa a'oozu bika Rabbi ai-yahduroon

textAr: حَتَّىٰٓ إِذَا جَآءَ أَحَدَهُمُ ٱلْمَوْتُ قَالَ رَبِّ ٱرْجِعُونِ
textEn: Until when death comes to one of them, he says, “My Lord, send me back,
textTranslit: Hattaaa izaa jaaa'a ahada humul mawtu qaala Rabbir ji'oon

textAr: لَعَلِّىٓ أَعْمَلُ صَـٰلِحًا فِيمَا تَرَكْتُ ۚ كَلَّآ ۚ إِنَّهَا كَلِمَةٌ هُوَ قَآئِلُهَا ۖ وَمِن وَرَآئِهِم بَرْزَخٌ إِلَىٰ يَوْمِ يُبْعَثُونَ
textEn: so that I may do righteous deeds in what I left behind.” No, it is only a word he utters. And behind them is a barrier until the Day they are resurrected
textTranslit: La'alleee a'malu saalihan feemaa taraktu kallaa; innahaa kalimatun huwa qaaa'iluhaa wa minw waraaa'him barzakhun ilaa Yawmi yub'asoon

textAr: فَإِذَا نُفِخَ فِى ٱلصُّورِ فَلَآ أَنسَابَ بَيْنَهُمْ يَوْمَئِذٍ وَلَا يَتَسَآءَلُونَ
textEn: When the Trumpet is blown, there will be no kinship ties between them on that Day, nor will they ask about one another.
textTranslit: Fa izaa nufikha fis Soori falaaa ansaaba bainahum yawma'izinw wa laa yatasaaa'aloon

textAr: فَمَن ثَقُلَتْ مَوَٰزِينُهُۥ فَأُو۟لَـٰٓئِكَ هُمُ ٱلْمُفْلِحُونَ
textEn: So those whose scales [of good deeds] are heavy, it is they who will be successful.
textTranslit: Faman saqulat mawaazee nuhoo fa ulaaa'ika humul muflihoon

textAr: وَمَنْ خَفَّتْ مَوَٰزِينُهُۥ فَأُو۟لَـٰٓئِكَ ٱلَّذِينَ خَسِرُوٓا۟ أَنفُسَهُمْ فِى جَهَنَّمَ خَـٰلِدُونَ
textEn: But those whose scales are light, they are the ones who have lost their souls, abiding in Hell forever.
textTranslit: Wa man khaffat mawaa zeenuhoo fa ulaaa'ikal lazeena khasiroon anfusahum fee Jahannnama khaalidoon

textAr: تَلْفَحُ وُجُوهَهُمُ ٱلنَّارُ وَهُمْ فِيهَا كَـٰلِحُونَ
textEn: The Fire will scorch their faces, leaving them disfigured.
textTranslit: Talfahu wujoohahumun Naaru wa hum feehaa kaalihood

textAr: أَلَمْ تَكُنْ ءَايَـٰتِى تُتْلَىٰ عَلَيْكُمْ فَكُنتُم بِهَا تُكَذِّبُونَ
textEn: “Were not My verses recited to you, and you used to reject them?”
textTranslit: Alam takun Aayaatee tutlaa 'alaikum fakuntum bihaa tukazziboon

textAr: قَالُوا۟ رَبَّنَا غَلَبَتْ عَلَيْنَا شِقْوَتُنَا وَكُنَّا قَوْمًا ضَآلِّينَ
textEn: They will say, “Our Lord, our misfortune overwhelmed us, and we were a people who went astray.
textTranslit: Qaaloo Rabbanaa ghalabat 'alainaa shiqwatunaa wa kunnaa qawman daaalleen

textAr: رَبَّنَآ أَخْرِجْنَا مِنْهَا فَإِنْ عُدْنَا فَإِنَّا ظَـٰلِمُونَ
textEn: Our Lord, take us out of this; if we returned [to evil], we would certainly be wrongdoers.”
textTranslit: Rabbanaa akhrijnaa minhaa fa in 'udnaa fa innaa zaalimoon

textAr: قَالَ ٱخْسَـُٔوا۟ فِيهَا وَلَا تُكَلِّمُونِ
textEn: Allah will say, “Stay therein despised and do not speak to Me.
textTranslit: Qaalakh sa'oo feehaa wa laa tukallimoon

textAr: إِنَّهُۥ كَانَ فَرِيقٌ مِّنْ عِبَادِى يَقُولُونَ رَبَّنَآ ءَامَنَّا فَٱغْفِرْ لَنَا وَٱرْحَمْنَا وَأَنتَ خَيْرُ ٱلرَّٰحِمِينَ
textEn: There was a group of My slaves who used to pray, ‘Our Lord, we believe, so forgive us and have mercy upon us, and You are the Most Merciful of those who show mercy.’
textTranslit: Innahoo kaana fareequm min 'ibaadee yaqooloona Rabbanaaa aamannaa faghfir lanaa warhamnaa wa Anta khairur raahimeen

textAr: فَٱتَّخَذْتُمُوهُمْ سِخْرِيًّا حَتَّىٰٓ أَنسَوْكُمْ ذِكْرِى وَكُنتُم مِّنْهُمْ تَضْحَكُونَ
textEn: But you took them in mockery until they made you forget My remembrance, and you used to laugh at them.
textTranslit: Fattakhaztumoohum sikhriyyan hattaaa ansawkum zikree wa kuntum minhum tadhakoon

textAr: إِنِّى جَزَيْتُهُمُ ٱلْيَوْمَ بِمَا صَبَرُوٓا۟ أَنَّهُمْ هُمُ ٱلْفَآئِزُونَ
textEn: I have rewarded them Today for their patience; it is they who are the successful.”
textTranslit: Inee jazaituhumul Yawma bimaa sabarooo annahum humul faaa'izoon

textAr: قَـٰلَ كَمْ لَبِثْتُمْ فِى ٱلْأَرْضِ عَدَدَ سِنِينَ
textEn: He will say, “How many years did you stay on earth?”
textTranslit: Qaala kam labistum fil ardi 'adada sineen

textAr: قَالُوا۟ لَبِثْنَا يَوْمًا أَوْ بَعْضَ يَوْمٍ فَسْـَٔلِ ٱلْعَآدِّينَ
textEn: They will say, “We stayed for a day or part of a day; ask those who keep count.”
textTranslit: Qaaloo labisnaa yawman aw ba'da yawmin fas'alil 'aaaddeen

textAr: قَـٰلَ إِن لَّبِثْتُمْ إِلَّا قَلِيلًا ۖ لَّوْ أَنَّكُمْ كُنتُمْ تَعْلَمُونَ
textEn: Allah will say, “You only stayed for a while, if only you had known.
textTranslit: Qaala il labistum illaa qaleelal law annakum kuntum ta'lamoon

textAr: أَفَحَسِبْتُمْ أَنَّمَا خَلَقْنَـٰكُمْ عَبَثًا وَأَنَّكُمْ إِلَيْنَا لَا تُرْجَعُونَ
textEn: Did you think that We created you with no purpose and that you would not be brought back to Us?”
textTranslit: Afahsibtum annamaa khalaqnaakum 'abasanw wa annakum ilainaa laa turja'oon

textAr: فَتَعَـٰلَى ٱللَّهُ ٱلْمَلِكُ ٱلْحَقُّ ۖ لَآ إِلَـٰهَ إِلَّا هُوَ رَبُّ ٱلْعَرْشِ ٱلْكَرِيمِ
textEn: Exalted is Allah, the True Sovereign! None has the right to be worshiped except Him, the Lord of the Honorable Throne.
textTranslit: Fata'aalal laahul Malikul Haqq; laaa ilaaha illaa Huwa Rabbul 'Arshil Kareem

textAr: وَمَن يَدْعُ مَعَ ٱللَّهِ إِلَـٰهًا ءَاخَرَ لَا بُرْهَـٰنَ لَهُۥ بِهِۦ فَإِنَّمَا حِسَابُهُۥ عِندَ رَبِّهِۦٓ ۚ إِنَّهُۥ لَا يُفْلِحُ ٱلْكَـٰفِرُونَ
textEn: Whoever invokes another god besides Allah, for which he has no proof, his reckoning will be with his Lord. Indeed, the disbelievers will never succeed.
textTranslit: Wa mai yad'u ma'allaahi ilaahan aakhara laa burhaana lahoo bihee fa innnamaa hisaabuhoo 'inda Rabbih; innahoo laa yuflihul kaafiroon

textAr: وَقُل رَّبِّ ٱغْفِرْ وَٱرْحَمْ وَأَنتَ خَيْرُ ٱلرَّٰحِمِينَ
textEn: Say, “My Lord, forgive and have mercy, and you are the Best of those who show mercy.”
textTranslit: Wa qur Rabbigh fir warham wa Anta khairur raahimeen
